mapper.select: SELECT l.id AS lesson_id, u.nickname AS member_name, l.client_id, l.status, DATE_FORMAT(l.start_time, '%H:%i') AS start_time, DATE_FORMAT(l.end_time, '%H:%i') AS end_time, TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, l.start_time, l.end_time) AS duration_minutes, DATE_FORMAT(l.lesson_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS lesson_date FROM lesson l JOIN member m ON l.client_id = m.id JOIN USER u ON m.user_id = u.id WHERE l.lesson_date = #{date} AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM MEMBERSHIP_PT mpt WHERE mpt.member_id = m.id AND mpt.trainer_id = #{trainerId} ) ORDER BY l.start_time ASC

SELECT l.id AS lesson_id, u.nickname AS member_name, l.client_id, l.status, DATE_FORMAT(l.start_time, '%H:%i') AS start_time, DATE_FORMAT(l.end_time, '%H:%i') AS end_time, TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, l.start_time, l.end_time) AS duration_minutes, DATE_FORMAT(l.lesson_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS lesson_date FROM lesson l JOIN member m ON l.client_id = m.id JOIN USER u ON m.user_id = u.id WHERE l.lesson_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM MEMBERSHIP_PT mpt WHERE mpt.member_id = m.id AND mpt.trainer_id = #{trainerId} ) ORDER BY l.lesson_date ASC, l.start_time ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO LESSON (trainer_id, client_id, lesson_date, start_time, end_time, status) VALUES (#{trainerId}, #{clientId}, #{lessonDate}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, '예약완료')
